qualified_ticket_ids: array of strings; required; qualified ticket IDs sorted ascending
incident_linked_count: integer; required; count of qualified tickets with a linked incident
incident_linked_ticket_ids: array of strings; required; incident-linked qualified ticket IDs sorted ascending
sla_breach_rate: number; required; decimal ratio rounded to 4 places
p1_p2_open_count: integer; required; count qualified P1/P2 tickets whose status is open or in_progress
top_accounts_ordering: top_accounts must contain the top 5 accounts ordered by descending ticket_count, then ascending account_id
